# Test Data

This directory contains sample MIDI files and other test data for integration testing.

## Contents

Test data files are automatically generated by the integration test framework when needed. Common test files include:

### Automatically Generated Files

- `test_simple.mid` - Simple C major scale for basic testing
- `test_empty.mid` - Empty MIDI file for edge case testing
- `test_chord_progression.mid` - Chord progression for harmony testing

### Adding Custom Test Data

To add custom test data for specific test cases:

1. Place MIDI files in this directory
2. Use descriptive names (e.g., `test_jazz_progression.mid`)
3. Document the musical content in this README
4. Reference the files in your test cases

### Test Data Guidelines

- Keep files small (< 1MB) for fast test execution
- Use diverse musical content (different styles, tempos, etc.)
- Include edge cases (empty files, single notes, etc.)
- Document any special musical features

## Usage in Tests

```python
from pathlib import Path

test_data_dir = Path("tests/test_data")
test_file = test_data_dir / "test_simple.mid"

# Use in your tests
extractor = DeepFeatureExtractor()
features = extractor.extract_features(str(test_file))
```

## Cleanup

Test data files can be regenerated at any time. To clean up:

```bash
rm tests/test_data/*.mid
```

The integration test framework will regenerate needed files automatically.
